data_flows.description: Router classifies task and dispatches to agent with injected spec, skills, and memory
Agent invokes MCP tools (file, shell, memory, ontology bridge) during execution
Post-execution trajectory stored in learning service for pattern extraction

guides.description: Agent specification hooks.pre phase: pattern search, memory injection, context priming before execution. Sourced from host-level agent config, not a repo file.
Three-tier instruction hierarchy: global behavioural rules, workspace config, project overrides. Each layer overrides the previous. Sourced from host-level agent config.
Task-to-agent classification across 9 agent types with skill decision tree for tool selection. Sourced from host-level agent config.
MCP tool allowlist and permission boundaries. Agents may only invoke tools within their declared permission scope. Sourced from host-level agent config.
SLO thresholds per adapter slot: p95 latency ceiling, throughput floor, error rate ceiling (agentbox ADR-005 — the pluggable-adapter architecture, distinct from VisionFlow ADR-005)

sensors.description: Adapter contract test suites validate slot conformance per agentbox ADR-031

Post-execution trajectory check: validates whether agent respected guide constraints during execution. PLANNED — the hooks.validate phase (ADR-004 decision D3) is not wired in any production agent spec; the three-phase lifecycle currently runs pre -> execution -> post only.
Router classification confidence score. Low confidence triggers fallback to general agent or human escalation. Sourced from host-level agent config.
BC20 anti-corruption bridge counters: dropped events and boundary crossing violations across the provenance bridge
CI gate enforcing adapter SLO thresholds from agentbox ADR-005. PLANNED — no adapter-slo.yml workflow exists; the SLO assertions are currently it.todo() stubs (see closeout T2).
